title: Deep Unsupervised Learning using Nonequilibrium Thermodynamics
note: Introduces the original diffusion probabilistic modeling framework: a fixed forward noising process and a learned reverse denoising process.

title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
note: Defines the modern DDPM formulation and noise-prediction training objective; also serves as the baseline that later improvements build on.

title: Generative Modeling by Estimating Gradients of the Data Distribution
note: Introduces noise-conditioned score networks and provides the score-based view used to interpret diffusion noise prediction.

title: Improved Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
note: Improves DDPM with cosine noise schedule, learned reverse variance, and a hybrid objective for better likelihood and sample quality.

title: Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models
note: Introduces DDIM, a deterministic or partially stochastic sampling formulation that reduces the number of diffusion sampling steps.

title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
note: Moves diffusion from pixel space to latent space, making high-resolution and conditional image generation more practical.
